summary: Complete end-to-end testing of Geo Intel (Radar) module with 100% backend API success and full frontend functionality
passed_tests: All 34 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
GET /api/geo/map - map points endpoint returns 199 points
GET /api/geo/radar - radar endpoint with distanceMeters, isInsideRadius fields functional
GET /api/geo/stats/full - full stats with hourly, weekday, districts operational
POST /api/geo/admin/seed - seed test data endpoint working
Frontend map view renders with points and interactive map
Frontend radar mode toggle functional (Радар OFF/ON)
Frontend stats view shows event distribution with 12 statistics
View toggle buttons (Карта, Список, Статистика) fully functional
All sidebar components (Markers, AI Summary, Top Places) render correctly
Rebuild button is present and clickable
Map displays OpenStreetMap tiles with markers for geo events
Radar radius selector appears when radar mode is enabled
All UI text in Ukrainian as expected
No JavaScript errors or console errors found
